title: lophiaris pohliana
intro: Lophiaris pohliana, also known as the "Pohlia's Lophair", is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential natural remedy for wound healing and infections. Some of the reported health benefits of Lophiaris pohliana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Lophiaris pohliana are typically made from the plant's roots and leaves, which are often dried and processed into capsules, teas, or tinctures for medicinal use.
